title: Teleporters By Juix
description: Datapack adding teleporters that easily connect 2 locations in the world, highly customizable !
body:
# ℹ️ Teleporters By Juix The Teleporters pack adds teleportation beacons to your game, linking two hard-to-reach locations, even through different dimensions ! This pack is ideal for multiplayer games, and for connecting distant houses. You have to download my resource pack to enjoy the custom textures !

Double right click on a teleporter to move the point, or Double left click to remove the pair (v2.0+) ! Discover all the features below ! (and don't forget to check out the Options section for customization)

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a458b9511b83fe793555b9985d4aa9cec4dea27e.webp)
# ⚠️ Resourcepack needed You have to download Juix Resources [v1.3] (or later) to enable the custom textures (datapack version only)
[Juix Resources [v1.7+]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/juix-resources/versions)
# ⚒️ Recipes Since this is a data pack, the crafts will not be displayed in JEI or REI. - _**/trigger show_recipes_in_chat**_ | shows recipes in chat - _**/trigger show_recipes_in_browser**_ | easier to read : it generates a chat link that displays all recipes included in my packs (if they are installed) You can craft teleporters in two ways

![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b812c157fdb0f889d8798769f7458c4758bb64f.png)

💎 Features

Placing the first point

 Placing the second point

 Using the teleporter
Renaming a point (v2.0+)

 Coloring a point (v2.4+)

 Moving a point (v2.0+)
➡️Double right click
Removing a pair (v2.0+)
➡️Double left click
# 🆕 Options - **_/function datapack:teleporters_datapack/change_teleportation_cooldown_** - To set the teleportation delay to 1.5s, 3s, 5s, or 0s(Instant) (v2.4+) - **_/function datapack:teleporters_datapack/toggle_villagers_can_use_teleporters_** - To enable teleportation for villagers (v2.0+) - **_/function datapack:teleporters_datapack/toggle_particles_generating_** - To disable teleporters' particles & reduce client side lags (v2.0+) - **_/function datapack:teleporters_datapack/toggle_floating_names_visibility_** - To disable teleporters' floating names (which are visible through the blocks) for discretion (v2.0+)
# 🪳 Known issues - Many teleporters, may cause a few more lag due to the forced chunk loading where they are placed. - Be careful if you play a map using command blocks : for performance reasons, if you remove all the teleporters placed in a chunk, the chunk will no longer be forceloaded. Quick report - https://juixcode.github.io/contact
# 🔃 Ask for a version You can **report a bug** or ask me to **update one of my pack to a specific version**, using one of these contact methods : - Quick message - https://juixcode.github.io/contact - My mail - juixcontact@gmail.com - The Discord server - clikc-here-to-join
# ❤️ Donations If you like my packs, you can tip me on my Ko-Fi page. Thank you so much if you do !
https://ko-fi.com/juixcode
